markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services to Fleet for potential collaboration on improving Fleet's organic search presence and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Fleet seeks to increase visibility in LLM/AI search results for device management and MDM topics](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy sprint ($20k) followed by ongoing growth execution ($12k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach combines AI-powered workflows with human expertise to create high-quality, targeted content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Fleet's open-source approach and existing documentation structure align well with GrowthX's content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)

## Topics

### Fleet's Current Marketing Challenges

  - [Mike (CEO) is currently running marketing, with a new marketer starting in about two months](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Fleet has a niche audience of Linux and Mac admins in enterprise settings](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [They haven't invested much in SEO to date but see increasing conversions driven by LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Fleet wants to show up more in relevant searches and be considered a "real option" in the MDM space](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Approach

  - [Uses a mix of AI-powered workflows and human expertise to create high-quality, targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Creates detailed audience personas and maps topics to audience pain points and jobs-to-be-done](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Employs fact-checking and expert review processes to ensure accuracy, especially for technical content](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Focuses on creating credible content at scale to answer audience questions comprehensively](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)

### GrowthX's Service Offering

  - [8-week strategy sprint ($20k) to understand the business, create artifacts, and begin content creation](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Ongoing growth execution phase ($12k/month) for continued content production and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
  - [Handles end-to-end content creation, including publishing directly to the client's CMS when possible](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Provides weekly monitoring and reporting on content performance](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)

### Integration with Fleet's Existing Processes

  - [Fleet uses a markdown-based CMS with pull requests for content updates](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [GrowthX will adapt to Fleet's existing publishing workflow and writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Fleet commits to reviewing and merging pull requests within one business day](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send contracts and available kickoff dates to Mike](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Mike to sign the contract via DocuSign](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
  - [GrowthX to send calendar invites for upcoming meetings and kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [Set up a Slack channel for easy communication between teams](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [Schedule deep dives on Fleet's product and audience during the initial strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/QR1xEBuS5SphFpfw1sgk3caNcMQM9Mtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
